page_content: In addition, it should be noted that the SSN of a parent, guardian or spouse of an applicant is also requested if the student claims dependency on that person for ﬁnancial aid or residency for tuition purposes. A parent, guardian or spouse is advised that disclosure of his or her SSN is necessary for the above student purpose and failure to provide it may affect the student’s ﬁnancial aid or tuition status. A parent’s, guardian’s or spouse’s SSN will only be used for the purpose for which it was collected and will not be maintained in any other system of records. A unique U ID Number is assigned to students as part of their initial application to the University and is used for all University identiﬁcation purposes.”
